title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jayabheri Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jayabheri Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!
